name: notion-obsidian-integration
description: Private Notion and Obsidian sync with an encrypted knowledge graph
author: João Lucas Oliveira

scripts.demo: npm run build -w @grandbox-bridge/shared && npm run build -w @grandbox-bridge/web && node scripts/serve-graph-demo.mjs
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b shared worker plugin relay && npm run typecheck -w @grandbox-bridge/web && npm run typecheck:api
scripts.build: npm run build -w @grandbox-bridge/shared && npm run build -w @grandbox-bridge/worker && npm run build -w @grandbox-bridge/plugin && npm run build -w @grandbox-bridge/relay && npm run build -w @grandbox-bridge/web && npm run smoke:worker-development-export
scripts.package:plugin: npm run build -w @grandbox-bridge/worker && npm run build -w @grandbox-bridge/plugin && node scripts/prepare-plugin-release.mjs
scripts.check: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
